# Save Game Fixtures

This directory contains `.d2s` save game files used for testing and reverse engineering the D2R (Reign of the Warlock DLC) file format.

## Directory Structure

```
savegames/
├── original/     ← Golden Master files (read-only reference generated by game)
└── modified/     ← Test outputs generated by our tools (verified against original)
```

---

## ⚖️ Testing Methodology

We employ a **Golden Master TDD Strategy** to ensure bit-perfect save file manipulation.

### 1. Dynamic Item Extraction (Self-Sufficient Tests)
Instead of storing hundreds of static `.d2i` (item) files, our tests now use `amazon_initial.d2s` as a "Live Library". 
- Items are extracted on-the-fly using `d2item_extract`.
- Extracted bits are then injected into a base file (`amazon_empty.d2s`).
- The result is verified against a Golden Master (e.g., `amazon_10_scrolls.d2s`) using `d2save_item_diff`.

### 2. Verification Suite
Use the following tools to validate any generated save file:
- **`d2save_verify`**: Checks Magic bytes, File Size, Checksum, and JM marker integrity.
- **`d2save_item_diff`**: Performs a bit-perfect comparison of the item section (ignoring character stats).
- **`d2save_map`**: Visualizes the internal structure and section offsets.

---

## 📂 original/

### `amazon_initial.d2s`
The definitive "Character Creation" specimen. Used as the main source for extracting default items (Scrolls, Potions).

### `amazon_empty.d2s`
A level 1 Amazon with a completely cleared inventory. Serves as the clean slate for all injection tests.

### `amazon_10_scrolls.d2s`
The **Golden Master** for bulk injection. It contains exactly 10 Town Portal Scrolls placed manually in-game.

### `amazon_moved_*.d2s`
Reference files where items were moved to specific coordinates (e.g., (0,0) or (9,3)) to reverse engineer the coordinate bit-mapping.

### `amazon_authority_runeword.d2s`
**Testing for D2R custom 'Authority' runeword and socketed items.**
- Includes an empty 3-socket armor (likely Ghost Armor).
- Includes an armor with the 'Authority' runeword (Hel + Shael + Ral) from the D2R 'Reign of the Warlock' DLC.
- Contains Warlock-specific skills and new Stat IDs (e.g., 385), used for testing modern D2R specifications and recursive socket parsing.

---

## 🛠️ modified/ (Generated Results)

### `amazon_10_scrolls_fixed.d2s`
A reconstructed version of the 10-scroll specimen. 
- ✅ Fixed the 70/72-bit shift bug.
- ✅ Correctly preserved the 15-byte footer.
- ✅ Verified compatible with DLC Editor and Game Client.

### `transfer_test.d2s`
A successful demonstration of **Inter-character Item Transfer**:
1. Item extracted from `amazon_initial.d2s`.
2. Injected into `amazon_empty.d2s`.
3. Validated as a playable, healthy save file.

---

## 🎮 How to Test In-Game

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **To load a fixture in-game:**
> 1. Copy the desired `.d2s` file to `%USERPROFILE%\Saved Games\Diablo II Resurrected`.
> 2. Rename it to `TESTAMAZON.d2s`.
> 3. Ensure no other `.d2s` files with the same internal name exist in that folder.
>
> The engine requires the filename to match the internal name at offset `0x14`. All our fixtures use **"TESTAMAZON"**.
